text:
This patch fix the detection of IPv6 headers and variable.

This fix the 2007 bug from Quagga :
 https://bugzilla.quagga.net/show_bug.cgi?id=408

Added file(s):
- files/patch-configure.ac

Port maintainer (boris@tagnet.ru) is cc'd.
